productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Washed Blue Jeans
description: Composition Washed blue stretchable denim trousers made of 98% cotton and 2% spandex, has two pockets on the front, two patch pockets at the back, looped waist, contrast stitch detailing and a zipper and button closure on the front Fit Slim Wash care Delicate machine wash cold Do not bleach, scrub, wring or tumble dry Hang dry in shade Warm iron Your fail-safe slim fit day to night denim style is finally here! United Colours of Benetton has fashioned this slim fit dark blue-hued jeans with a cotton-spandex fabric to offer exemplary comfort and a flattering fit. Wear this with t-shirts, kurtis or blouson tops and heels. Model statistics The product is a size 32 on a model of height 5'7&rdquo , waist 25" and hips 35&rdquo
